CINECAST

star 8.9 IMDB • 2024

THE NEON PARADOX

Sci-Fi Thriller 142 MIN 4K ULTRA HD

Overview

In a fractured timeline where digital consciousness is traded like currency, a rogue encryption architect must navigate the labyrinthine corridors of a megacity that never sleeps. When a secret buried in the core of the central engine threatens to delete the fabric of reality, an unlikely alliance forms between the architect and a ghost from the old world. As the boundaries between memory and simulation dissolve, they must decide if humanity is worth saving in a world that has already chosen to forget.

DIRECTOR Elena Vance
WRITER Julian Thorne
CINEMATOGRAPHY Marcus Grey
BUDGET $185M
AVAILABILITY Exclusive Premiere
verified
